steps.text: {toy} stretches and yawns as the sun rises over a sleepy land.
{toy} hears something rustling — could it be a {slot}?
Following the sound, {toy} discovers footprints leading toward a meadow.
In the meadow, {toy} meets the {slot} and offers a warm hello.
{toy} and the {slot} share breakfast as the day begins. The end!
{toy} packs a tiny backpack for an afternoon journey to find a {slot}.
Crossing a wobbly bridge, {toy} steps very carefully.
{toy} climbs a small hill and looks out across the land.
At the top of the hill, {toy} spots the {slot} resting in the grass.
{toy} waves hello, makes a friend, and walks home with a happy heart.
{toy} sits by a glowing campfire, ready to tell a tale of {slot}.
Long ago, {toy} says, the {slot} lived deep in a forest of singing trees.
One night, the {slot} got lost — but a kind firefly lit the way.
The firefly led the {slot} to a clearing full of sleeping animals.
The {slot} curled up safe and sound — and so does {toy}, ending the tale.
{toy} whispers: tonight's story is about a sleepy {slot}.
The {slot} lived in a quiet valley where the stars hummed lullabies.
Each night the {slot} brushed its soft blanket and counted falling petals.
When the moon rose, the {slot} closed its eyes and dreamed of soft clouds.
{toy} yawns. Goodnight, {slot}. Goodnight, friends.
Once upon a time, a very curious {slot} lived next door to {toy}.
Every morning the {slot} asked {toy} the same question: 'What's that?'
Today, {toy} answered with a riddle instead of a fact.
The {slot} thought hard, scratched its chin, and guessed three silly answers.
Together, {toy} and the {slot} solved the riddle — and laughed all afternoon.
